nasb.text: You shall not worship them or serve them; for I, the Lord your God, am a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers on the children, on the third and the fourth generations of those who hate Me,

esv.text: You shall not bow down to them or serve them, for I the Lord your God am a jealous God, visiting the iniquity of the fathers on the children to the third and the fourth generation of those who hate me,

cnv.text: 不可跪拜它們，也不可事奉它們，因為我耶和華你們的　神是忌邪的　神；恨惡我的，我必追討他們的罪，從父親到兒子，直到三四代。

ccb.text: 不可跪拜它们，也不可供奉它们，因为我——你的上帝耶和华痛恨不贞，我必追讨背弃我之人的罪，从父到子直到三四代。
